intended_use_full: Bunkerhill AVC is a software device intended for use in detecting presence and estimating quantity of aortic valve calcification for adult patients aged 40 years and above. The device automatically analyzes non-gated, non-contrast chest computed tomography (CT) images collected during clinical care and outputs the region of interest (intended for informational purposes only) and quantification of detected calcium.
ground_truth: established ground truth for localization and agreement analysis of aortic valve calcification
other_metrics: Bland Altman agreement analysis with observed bias of –5.15 AU, lower limit of agreement –200.96 AU, upper limit of agreement 190.65 AU; Precision 0.826 (95% CI: 0.784, 0.863); Recall 0.855 (95% CI: 0.818, 0.890)
